children.heading: United States Public Health Services Track
children.label: a United States Public Health Services Track
A
children.text: 150 medical students annually, 10 of whom shall be awarded studentships to the Uniformed Services University of Health Sciences;

children.label: E
children.text: 100 behavioral and mental health professional students annually;

children.label: F
children.text: 100 physician assistant or nurse practitioner students annually; and

children.heading: Locations
children.label: 2 Locations
children.text: The Track shall be located at existing and accredited, affiliated health professions education training programs at academic health centers located in regions of the United States determined appropriate by the Surgeon General, in consultation with the National Health Care Workforce Commission established in .section 294q of this title

children.heading: Number of graduates
children.label: b Number of graduates
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (a), the number of persons to be graduated from the Track shall be prescribed by the Secretary. In so prescribing the number of persons to be graduated from the Track, the Secretary shall institute actions necessary to ensure the maximum number of first-year enrollments in the Track consistent with the academic capacity of the affiliated sites and the needs of the United States for medical, dental, and nursing personnel.

children.heading: Development
children.label: c Development
children.text: The development of the Track may be by such phases as the Secretary may prescribe subject to the requirements of subsection (a).

children.heading: Integrated longitudinal plan
children.label: d Integrated longitudinal plan
children.text: The Surgeon General shall develop an integrated longitudinal plan for health professions continuing education throughout the continuum of health-related education, training, and practice. Training under such plan shall emphasize patient-centered, interdisciplinary, and care coordination skills. Experience with deployment of emergency response teams shall be included during the clinical experiences.

children.heading: Faculty development
children.label: e Faculty development
children.text: The Surgeon General shall develop faculty development programs and curricula in decentralized venues of health care, to balance urban, tertiary, and inpatient venues.
